title: kbs console get search prints active search query
description:
Given the console server is running
And a search query is active (e.g., after kbs console search 'login bug')

When I run kbs console get search

Then the command prints the current search query (e.g., 'login bug')

Given no search query is active (search is clear)

When I run kbs console get search

Then the command prints 'none'

Given the console server is not running

When I run kbs console get search

Then the command prints 'Console server is not running.' and exits 0

Acceptance criteria:
- Output is a single line
- No error exit code when server is offline
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented kbs console get focus/view/search. Each field prints a single line (issue ID, view mode, or search query), 'none' if unset, or 'Console server is not running.' if offline.
